name: Flying Chariot
description:
The chariot's riders and creatures pulling the chariot gain a +1 bonus to their AC.
If this magic chariot is pulled by one or more flying creatures, it too can fly.
{"type": "inset", "name": "Chariots", "entries": ["Chariots and the creatures pulling them work like controlled mounts, as described in the mounted combat rules in the {@book Player's Handbook|PHB|9|Mounted Combat}, but with the following differences:", {"type": "list", "items": ["Mounting or dismounting a chariot costs you 5 feet of
